title: Problem with quickstart-react - WARN: retrying connection to the server (attempt 7)
excerpt:
I have a warning 
WARN: retrying connection to the server (attempt)... 
in quickstart-react anyone has the same problems? 
Can I do something? Or can I only wait?

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a warning
WARN: retrying connection to the server (attempt)...
in quickstart-react anyone has the same problems?
Can I do something? Or can I only wait?

posts.author: mpsujek (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml: Also I have an error when I try to upload build to monday.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mpsujek,

I see you opened a ticket with us about this. I replied over there

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: thinhle183 (Thinh Le)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I get the same problem. Could you give me any answer about it here?
Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @thinhle183 and welcome to the community!

Regarding the monday tunnel (what the quickstart guide is using to expose your project to the internet), our team is aware of some issues it is having.

They will we working on it but I do not have an ETA on when that could be fixed so they have recommended you try something different in the meantime like ngrok or something similar to expose your project to the internet.

I am sorry for the inconvenience!

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: sdarby (Sue Darby)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had the same question earlier this spring and it was answered for me in detail at so I wanted to pass on the longer in depth answer to help someone else!

Updating the instructions would be helpful!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
For those looking at this old thread and having similar issues – we fixed it by updating the monday tunnel to use ngrok under the hood.

If you’re still having this problem, clone the most recent version of the quickstart project and try again!
